nasb.text: So she departed and went and gleaned in the field after the reapers; and she happened to come to the portion of the field belonging to Boaz, who was of the family of Elimelech.

esv.text: So she set out and went and gleaned in the field after the reapers, and she happened to come to the part of the field belonging to Boaz, who was of the clan of Elimelech.

cnv.text: 路得就去了，來到田裡，在收割的人背後撿麥穗。她恰巧來到以利米勒同族的人波阿斯那塊田。

ccb.text: 于是，路得便去了。她恰巧来到以利米勒的亲戚波阿斯的田里，跟在收割的人后面捡麦穗。

csbs.text: 路得就去了，来到田里，在收割的人后面捡拾麦穗；她来到的这块田恰巧属于以利米勒家族中的波阿斯。
